case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. MICHEAL OMEKA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2024 CONTINUED TO MAY-07-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $275.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 72137806) AS TO DEFENDANT OMEKA, MICHEAL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 585(D) AND 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 72137806) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OMEKA, MICHEAL $1,999.19 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,274.19, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210040556) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OMEKA, MICHEAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2023

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210059054), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED JAN-09-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JAN-10-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT OMEKA, MICHEAL
DECLARATION RE: REDUCTION IN FILING FEE PURSUANT TO BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 6322.1 (TRANSACTION ID # 210040556) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 395 (B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 210040556) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72137806) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210040556) TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
